extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked on the final Cat-1 climb with roughly 15km to go, distanced VINGEGAARD by 24 seconds to win Stage 6, though VINGEGAARD still took yellow jersey.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT immediate early attack signals Jumbo-Visma aggression to force selection before key climbs, tactic repeated from 2022
UAE countered Jumbo's yellow jersey ambitions by isolating VINGEGAARD on final Cat-1, reversing previous day's power dynamic
POGAČAR maintained full gas to finish line for time bonuses despite stage won, claiming back every possible second

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: deployed as first attacker from gun on 145km stage, forcing early responses before tourmalade
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: reversed prior day's weakness with sustained solo effort on final 15km Cat-1, gained 24sec on yellow jersey
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: isolated without teammates on final climb when POGAČAR attacked, lost time but achieved yellow jersey objective
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: one-day yellow jersey tenure ended but maintained podium position despite UAE aggression
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: active in early VAN AERT counterattacks, willing to engage on aggressive short mountain stage
rider_signals.SHAW James: neutral: attempted breakaway leadout role for teammate in intermediate sprint, first Tour reconnaissance effort
